subcodes.first_line: O pure-hearted ones! The Compassionate Lord desired to adorn the world, that through creation, tranquility may be attained, and the mirror reflect the sun's effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای راستان خداوند مهربان آرایش جهان خواست تا آفرینش آسایش یابد و آاینه آفتاب
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
